_comment: Repro: V4 + eval_every=10 to produce greedy-eval curves for paper (training_eval_metrics.png). Usage: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python train.py --profile forest_a_all6_300_cuda_v4_evalcurve
command: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python train.py --profile forest_a_all6_300_cuda_v4_evalcurve
changes_from_v4: Added eval_every=10 and eval_runs=5 to record greedy-eval metrics every 10 episodes; produces training_eval_metrics.png for paper.
